text_first_visit: A grand burial hall, half-submerged. Stone coffins rise from the water like islands. The ceiling is high enough that your torchlight doesn't reach it. Movement in the water — more than one.
text_revisit: The submerged hall. The water is still, but you know better.

interactables.name: Wall Carving
interactables.text_on_interact: A carved relief shows a knight in full plate, standing before a great door. The knight is pressing a sword into the door — no, into a creature behind the door. The inscription: 'The Warden chose to remain. The seal required a soul, and he gave his.'
